surprises.title: Welcome aboard, Bunny! 🚢
surprises.message: I love you so much! This is gonna be the best vacation ever!

surprises.title: 💕 Good Morning, Bunny 💕
surprises.message: Happy Anniversary, Holly. Can you believe it's been 20 years?! Today is for you — breakfast in bed, spa time, and special dinner tonight. I love you more than you know.

surprises.title: ☀️ Roatán Morning ☀️
surprises.message: Happy Tuesday, Holly. Today we explore Roatán and see some sloths! Sunscreen on, adventure mode on.
